functional.description: Integrate OpenTelemetry SDK for distributed tracing across services.
Propagate Correlation IDs across all asynchronous and synchronous boundaries.
functional.rationale: Track requests through the entire system.

functional.description: Implement structured JSON logging with correlation context.
Expose basic trace information in the dashboard.

assumptions.description: A collector (Jaeger/OTel Collector) is available or will be provisioned.

domainModel.description: A collection of spans representing a full request execution path.

interactions.description: Request enters API -> Create Root Span -> Pass TraceId to Agent -> Agent Creates Child Span -> DB Query creates child span.

edgeCases.scenario: Loss of connection to Trace Collector.
edgeCases.handling: Buffer traces locally (memory limit) or drop silently to avoid impacting application health.

terminology.definition: The basic building block of a trace, representing a single unit of work.
